mourning_cloak.name: Mourning Cloak
mourning_cloak.flavor: Black wool, threaded with the names the wearer no longer remembers.

drowned_cuirass.name: Drowned Cuirass
drowned_cuirass.flavor: Pulled from a weir-keeper still buckled into it, fifteen winters under the silt.

bonesong_vestment.name: Bonesong Vestment
bonesong_vestment.flavor: Hold-singer's robes. The hymn is stitched into the lining, and it still hums.

pall_touched_mail.name: Pall-Touched Mail
pall_touched_mail.flavor: Links that the Pall has tasted and refused. Hits slide off it like water off slate.

hollow_plate.name: Hollow Plate
hollow_plate.flavor: Plate of a Mourncross gate-warden. Empty inside. The dent on the breast is from a hammer.
